policyDetails.title: Policy details
policyDetails.description: Give your policy a name and choose how employees accrue time off.
policyDetails.accrualTypeHint: Choose how employees receive time off.
policyDetails.perHourPaidHint: Employees earn time off based on hours worked (e.g., 1 hour for every 40 hours worked).
policyDetails.perYearHint: Employees earn a set amount of time off each year (e.g., 120 hours per year).
policyDetails.unlimitedHint: Employees can take flexible time off with no set limit.
policyDetails.accrualRateDescription: Set the rate at which employees will accrue time off.
policyDetails.accrualRateAndUnitError: You must provide a valid base rate.
policyDetails.baseRateHint: This sets the base rate for accrued time off.
policyDetails.fixedAccrualRateHint: The total number of hours employees earn each year.
policyDetails.accrualMethodFixedHint: The rate at which employees will accrue paid time off.
policyDetails.perPayPeriodHint: Employees earn time off gradually with each paycheck.
policyDetails.allAtOnceHint: Employees receive their full annual time off balance upfront.
policyDetails.policyResetDateTypeHint: The accrual period will reset on this date each year.

policySettings.title: Policy settings
policySettings.accrualMaximumHint: Set the maximum balance an employee can accrue per period. Accrual will stop when this limit is reached.
policySettings.balanceMaximumHint: Set the maximum balance an employee can hold at once. Accrual stops when this limit is reached.
policySettings.carryOverLimitHint: Set the maximum hours allowed to carryover from one accrual period to the next.
policySettings.waitingPeriodHint: Set the number of days employees must work before they begin accruing time off.
policySettings.paidOutOnTerminationHint: Choose if unused time off is paid out when an employee leaves. Some states require it by law.

addEmployees.title: Add employees to your policy
addEmployees.employeesMovedWarning: Any employees currently assigned to another {{policyType}} policy will be moved to this policy.

startingBalances.title: Starting balances
startingBalances.description: If your employees have an existing balance, please enter those hours here. Employees moving to this policy from another will carry over their accrued hours.
startingBalances.noEmployees: You haven't added any employees to this policy yet, so there aren't any starting balances to add.
startingBalances.alertHeader: The following employees' balances need review

flash.policyUpdated: Details for this policy have been updated.
flash.policyActive: Your time off policy is active.
flash.employeesAdded_one: {{count}} employee has been added to this policy.
flash.employeesAdded_other: {{count}} employees have been added to this policy.
flash.balanceUpdated: {{name}}'s time off balance has been updated.
flash.settingsUpdated: Details for this policy have been updated.
